title: [Archived] Wulfhunter's Create Plus
description: A mod pack based on Create, made for Wulfhunter's Create Plus SMP. Includes Create, Farmer's Delight, addons for each, Alex's Caves, and much more. Utilize technology, cooking, exploration, new armor and weapons, and more.
body:
This modpack was created for Wulfhunter to use on their server. It is a great collection of mods for use on any server or single-player playthrough. Featured mods are Create (with many of the amazing additions), Farmers Delight, Alex's Caves, Tetra, and Terralith. Utilize technology, new foods, new armor and weapons, and exploration to experience a unique, Create focused playthrough.



**IMPORTANT**
- Don't use server file unless you are building a dedicated server.

- ~~For Servers use files with "server" included in the name, to connect to the server use "client" files.~~ (outdated)
- ~~For Single-player/LAN use files WITHOUT server or client in the name, or your game may not function properly.~~ (outdated)


Please note that this pack is still in development, use at your own risk. Suggestions for additions/changes are greatly appreciated!
